evidently.feature.entityoverride.CfnAbou: A set of key-value pairs that specify users who should always be served a specific variation of a feature. Each key specifies a user using their user ID, account ID, or some other identifier. The value specifies the name of the variation that the user is to be served.

evidently.feature.entityoverride.EntityI.Description: The entity ID to be served the variation specified in `Variation`.

evidently.feature.entityoverride.Variati.Description: The name of the variation to serve to the user session that matches the `EntityId`.
